title: Perforce Helix Swarm Review
description: A code review in Perforce Helix Swarm (P4 Code Review), representing a set of changelists under review with participants, votes, state transitions, and test/deploy status.

id.description: The unique review identifier assigned by Swarm.

author.description: The Perforce username of the review author.

changes.description: List of changelist IDs associated with this review.

commits.description: List of committed changelist IDs resulting from this review.

commitStatus.description: Status details for commit operations on this review.

created.description: Unix timestamp when the review was created.

deployDetails.description: Details of deployment operations triggered by this review.

deployStatus.description: The current deployment status for the review.

description.description: The review description, typically derived from the changelist description.

groups.description: Reviewer groups assigned to the review.

participants.description: Map of participant usernames to their participation details, including votes and required status.

pending.description: Whether the review is associated with a pending (shelved) changelist.

projects.description: Map of Swarm project IDs to the branch names affected by this review.

roles.description: Map of role names to lists of usernames holding those roles.

state.description: The current state of the review in its lifecycle.

stateLabel.description: A human-readable label for the current state.

testDetails.description: Details of test runs executed against this review.

testStatus.description: The overall test status for the review, such as pass or fail.

type.description: The review type. Default reviews are standard; personal reviews are private to the author.

updated.description: Unix timestamp when the review was last updated.

updateDate.description: ISO 8601 formatted date-time when the review was last updated.

versions.description: History of review versions, each representing an update to the shelved changelist.

Participant.description: A participant in a code review, including their vote and required status.

value.description: The vote value: 1 for up, -1 for down, 0 for no vote.

version.description: The review version the vote was cast on.

isStale.description: Whether the vote is stale due to subsequent review updates.

vote.description: The participant's vote on the review.

required.description: Whether the participant is a required reviewer.

ReviewerGroup.description: A group of reviewers assigned to a review.

name.description: The name of the reviewer group.

required.description: Whether at least one member of the group must approve the review.

quorum.description: The number of group members required to approve. Zero means all members.

ReviewVersion.description: A version snapshot of the review, created each time the shelved changelist is updated.

change.description: The changelist number for this version.

user.description: The user who created this version.

time.description: Unix timestamp when this version was created.

pending.description: Whether this version represents a pending change.

archiveChange.description: The archive changelist number for this version.

CommitStatus.description: Status of a commit operation on the review.

committer.description: The user who performed the commit.

start.description: Unix timestamp when the commit was initiated.

end.description: Unix timestamp when the commit completed.

DeployDetail.description: Details of a deployment triggered by the review.

url.description: URL to the deployment details or environment.

error.description: An error message if the deployment failed.

TestDetail.description: Details of a test run executed against the review.

url.description: URL to the test run results.

error.description: An error message if the test run failed.

Comment.description: A comment on a review or changelist in Helix Swarm.

edited.description: Unix timestamp of the last edit, or null if not edited.

likes.description: Usernames of users who liked the comment.

taskState.description: The task state of the comment.

time.description: Unix timestamp when the comment was created.

topic.description: The topic the comment belongs to, such as reviews/1234.

updated.description: Unix timestamp of the last update.

user.description: The Perforce username of the comment author.

CommentContext.description: Inline context for a file-level comment, specifying the file, line numbers, and surrounding content.

file.description: The depot file path for the inline comment.

content.description: Adjacent source code content for context.

version.description: The review version this comment applies to.
